steps.title: Identify the type of line x = 2
steps.content: $x = 2$ is a vertical line — its slope is undefined.

steps.title: Perpendicular to vertical = horizontal
steps.content: Perpendicular shortcut: the negative reciprocal of an undefined slope is $0$. A horizontal line has slope $0$. Any line perpendicular to $x=2$ must be parallel to the $x$-axis. That confirms A is correct.
